case_for: Josh Johnson would need an unforeseen starting opportunity due to injury ahead of him, and if thrust into full-time action he could theoretically accumulate garbage-time garbage-time counting stats, but nothing in the evidence supports this.
case_against: The pregame consensus projection of 0.0 points and his recent history of negligible fantasy production (0.7, 1.2, 0.0) strongly indicate he is a deep backup unlikely to see meaningful snaps.
